revision.text: {{#if:{{{df|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:j" "F|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} }} ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:Y-m-d|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}}){{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using start and end dates with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Start and end dates]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | df }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{df|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:j" "F|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} }} ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:Y-m-d|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}}){{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using start and end dates with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Start and end dates]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | df }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#if:{{{df|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:j" "F|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} }} ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:Y-m-d|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}}){{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using start and end dates with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Start and end dates]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | df }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#if:{{{df|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:j" "F|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} }} ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:Y-m-d|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}}){{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using start and end dates with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Start and end dates]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | df }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{df|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:j" "F|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} }} ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:Y-m-d|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}}){{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Start and end dates]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | df }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using start and end dates with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{df|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:j" "F|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j" "F" "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|{{{4}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{5}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}}–{{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} |{{#time:F" "j|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} |{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:F" "j," "Y|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}} }} }} ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}}} – {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|present|present|{{#time:Y-m-d|{{{4}}}-{{{5}}}-{{{6}}}}}}}){{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Start and end dates]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | df }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using start and end dates with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
